name: dynamic-hud
title: Dynamic HUD
author: aglaron
description:
Hide all UI/HUD by default and then dynamically show only relevant parts of UI based on player's current in-game actions.

Shows minimap when you are driving, shows weapons when you are fighting, shows shortcuts when you are rewiring your combinators, and some more.

Helps keeping your OLED safe from burn-ins as a bonus.
